message:
fix: use relative path for external_id to prevent subagent filename collisions

Subagent files under different parent sessions share the same basename
(e.g., agent-a297e09.jsonl), causing UNIQUE constraint failures on
(source_id, agent_id, external_id). Now uses strip_prefix to derive
a relative path from the scan root, with fallback to filename-only.

Closes Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#135

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
